description_long: This is a rectangular, pastel pink vending machine with a large transparent front panel displaying multiple rows of coiled dispensers for products, likely candy, as indicated by the Japanese text 'キャンディー' (candy) on the illuminated sign at the top. The front features a prominent 'PUSH' retrieval door at the bottom, a keypad and payment interface to the right, and a digital display above the keypad. Both side panels are decorated with an anime-style illustration of a girl's face, adding a playful and eye-catching element. The back of the machine is plain and unadorned, with a smooth, gradient pink finish. The machine stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly above the ground.
description: A pastel pink vending machine with a transparent front panel, anime-themed side art, and a prominent 'candy' sign on top. It features a keypad, payment interface, and a 'PUSH' retrieval door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent product window, keypad, payment interface, 'PUSH' retrieval door, and illuminated 'candy' sign.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the anime-style illustration and the machine's boxy, smooth side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, gradient pink surface with no visible features or decorations.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the same anime-style illustration and smooth panel.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular digital display panel is located on the right side of the front face, above the keypad and payment interface, showing illuminated content.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface with a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader is present on the right side of the front face, vertically aligned next to the keypad.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A keypad with individual square buttons labeled with alphanumeric codes (e.g., A1, B2) is located on the right side of the front face, below the display panel.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide rectangular retrieval door labeled 'PUSH' is located at the bottom center of the front face.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A large illuminated sign on top displays the Japanese word 'キャンディー' (candy) in white on a pink background; both side panels feature a large anime-style illustration of a girl's face.
